prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名稳定在第28名左右，属国内顶尖理工类高校；近年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及2021年校园交通安全事件及2024年投档线异常传言；抖音热度评级为「较热」（总排名第55位），短视频曝光量中等偏上；2023年电信学部曾出现断档至60000名的异常记录，但整体未对近年位次前移趋势产生持续压制；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共10个：化学工程与技术A+、力学A、土木工程A、工商管理A、机械工程A、生物医学工程A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A、控制科学与工程A-、环境科学与工程A-；工科整体实力强劲，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化、计算机类等大工核心工科专业均为高热推荐，报考热度持续走高；湖北省2026年物理类考生估算约25.1万人，较2025年小幅增加约0.6%，竞争略有加剧；大连理工大学位于辽宁省大连市，非湖北省内高校，但作为东北地区顶尖985，对湖北考生仍具较强跨省吸引力；该校在湖北招生规模适中，近年计划持续缩减。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次大幅前移趋势、2026年计划缩招19.4%加剧竞争、核心工科专业高热推荐、以及湖北物理类考生小幅增长等因素，预计2026年最低位次在2025年4962名基础上进一步前移；预测最低位次约4414名，区间3914–4914名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 8114 → 7842 → 7909 → 5099 → 4962. From 2021 to 2023, it remained stable in the 7800–8100 range. In 2024, it significantly advanced to 5099, and in 2025, it further advanced to 4962, with a cumulative advancement of about 2947 positions over the past two years, indicating a notable increase in popularity among Hubei Physics Category candidates. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 4962. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for Physics Category were 100 → 94 → 93 → 77 → 67, showing a yearly decreasing trend. The 2026 plan is 54, a reduction of 13 from 2025, a decrease of about 19.4%, further intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks around 28th on the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, making it a top-tier science and engineering university in China. In recent years, its reputation has been somewhat negative, mainly due to a campus traffic safety incident in 2021 and rumors of abnormal admission cutoffs in 2024. Its Douyin popularity rating is 'relatively hot' (55th overall), with medium-to-high short video exposure. In 2023, the School of Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering experienced an anomaly with a cutoff dropping to 60,000, but this did not persistently suppress the recent trend of ranking advancement. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it had 10 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Mechanical Engineering A, Biomedical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, and Environmental Science and Engineering A-. Its overall strength in engineering is robust, highly matching its enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors at DUT, such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Computer Science, are all highly recommended, with application popularity continuing to rise. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Hubei for 2026 is about 251,000, a slight increase of about 0.6% from 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. DUT is located in Dalian, Liaoning Province, not within Hubei, but as a top 985 university in Northeast China, it still holds strong cross-provincial appeal for Hubei candidates. Its enrollment scale in Hubei is moderate, with plans continuously decreasing in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant ranking advancement trend in 2024–2025, the 19.4% enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifying competition, the high popularity of core engineering majors, and the slight increase in Hubei Physics Category candidates, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to further advance from the 2025 baseline of 4962. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4414, with a range of 3914–4914.

- Computer Science and Technology (National Basic Disciplines Top Talent Program Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Materials (Electronic Information Materials)
- Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering
- Process Equipment and Control Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3914–4914, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 3900), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information Innovation Class). If the ranking is close to the upper bound (e.g., around 4900), it is advisable to mainly consider Tier 2 and safety Tier 3 majors, and be cautious with Tier 1.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次2921名基准、2026年扩招15%缓和竞争、历史类招生专业热度偏低（新闻传播明显劝退）、以及湖北历史类考生小幅增长等因素，预计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅后移；预测最低位次约3164名，区间2784–3544名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated around 2347→2891→3022→2740→2921, overall within the 2300–3000 range. The lowest was in 2021 (2347), then shifted to 2800–3000, with a slight recovery to 2740 in 2024 and a drop to 2921 in 2025. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2921. Enrollment plans for History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 17→15→16→20→20, stabilizing at 20 in 2024–2025. The 2026 plan is 23, an increase of 3 from 2025, a 15% expansion, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked around 28th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, belonging to top domestic universities. Recent reputation evaluations are somewhat negative, mainly involving a 2021 campus safety incident and abnormal admission score rumors in 2024. Douyin heat rating is 'relatively hot' (overall rank 55th), with moderate exposure. History Category has few majors and not in Dalian University of Technology's traditional strengths, so reputation impact on liberal arts applications is limited. Dalian University of Technology's A- and above disciplines are mainly engineering (Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, etc.), while History Category majors (Journalism and Communication, English, Japanese, Public Administration, Architecture) only Architecture can relate to Civil Engineering A, others have no direct A-level discipline support, overall liberal arts disciplinary support is weak.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Journalism and Communication has obvious social discouragement, foreign languages generally wait-and-see, Public Administration (related to Business Administration A) has divided wait-and-see popularity. In 2026, Hubei Province's History Category examinees are estimated at about 142,000, a slight increase of about 0.6% from 2025. Dalian University of Technology is located in Liaoning Province, not within Hubei, with a small History Category enrollment (over 20 people), cross-province appeal is relatively limited for liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 ranking baseline of 2921, the 15% expansion in 2026 easing competition, low popularity of History Category majors (Journalism and Communication clearly discouraged), and a slight increase in Hubei History Category examinees, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025. Predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3164, with a range of 2784–3544.
